subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! When the Most Great Luminary dawned from the horizon of Truth, the lights of mysteries shed such radiant beams [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان چون نیر اعظم از افق حقیقت طلوع نمود انوار اسرار چنان پرتوی بر
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism of color and light, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
